programme.title: Kyo Kii... Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
programme.desc: Raj is a lawyer who finds great success through his habit of lying. However, when his son wishes for his father to stop lying, Raj is magically forced to speak the truth and gets into trouble.

programme.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.

programme.title: Mere Jeevan Saathi
programme.desc: An Indian pop star is coming to USA in order to sign a contract with one of the leading music studios. He finds himself heaving one night affair with the CEO of the company. Things go wrong when he find her in his flight back home.

programme.title: Zameer: The Fire Within
programme.desc: Pooja gets married to Suraj but feels guilty for separating him from Supriya, his former fiancee. When Suraj learns the truth he abandons her, oblivious to the fact that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rahul is told by a street astrologer that he will find his soul-mate in a girl who has a birthmark on her right breast. Urmila Martodkar walks into his life, birthmark and all. But what they don’t know is that she is not a girl, but is a gay boy.

programme.title: Lucky: No Time for Love
programme.desc: The daughters of the Indian Ambassador in Russia, is being molested by a young Russian. She manages to escape and hide in a parked car, belongs to Aditya.

programme.title: Ghar Jamai
programme.desc: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: A waiter, is in love with the famous TV reporter Greeta Kapoor. After a man is murdered, Kapoor shows up at Raju's door to ask him some questions - it turns out that Raju served the dead man his last supper.

programme.title: Kyo Kii... Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
programme.desc: Raj is a lawyer who finds great success through his habit of lying. However, when his son wishes for his father to stop lying, Raj is magically forced to speak the truth and gets into trouble.

programme.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.

programme.title: Mere Jeevan Saathi
programme.desc: An Indian pop star is coming to USA in order to sign a contract with one of the leading music studios. He finds himself heaving one night affair with the CEO of the company. Things go wrong when he find her in his flight back home.

programme.title: Lal Baadshah
programme.desc: Lal Singh lives alongside his mother in a small basti in Mumbai, where Vikram Singh is the don of the city and there is always clash between him and Lal Baadshah.

programme.title: Namak
programme.desc: When Gopal, a servant, is announced as the heir to his employer's estate, the siblings of his master's family plot against him.

programme.title: Numbri Aadmi
programme.desc: Shankar, a noble thief, attempts to kill Rana, his father's murderer, in a bid to seek revenge. However, Rana has powerful friends who stand in Shankar's way.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: Three friend residents in the 'C' block of a Mumbai Apartment complex with monetary issues decide to create a fake organization 'C Company' in order to extort 1 Crore Rupees but thimgs goes wrong.

programme.title: Mission Istaanbul
programme.desc: A news reporter must uncover the secret on the 13th floor of a News Station.

programme.title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayi
programme.desc: Longtime friends suffer a rift in their relationship when their dreams and family obligations arrive at odds with each other.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: A notorious boy decides to attend college in Bangalore, but instead falls in love with a girl who has to marry a terrorizing police officer.
